jobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
jobs.description:
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

jobs.title: History Teacher
jobs.description:
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 126 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.en: Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 126 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.it: Inspired Education è il principale gruppo globale di scuole premium, con un portafoglio di 126 scuole private premium distribuite su 6 continenti che utilizzano pratiche educative collaudate provenienti da ogni angolo del mondo, garantendo a oltre 95.000 studenti un’esperienza di apprendimento di livello mondiale dalla Scuola dell’Infanzia al 13° anno. La Scuola Internazionale del Ticino (IST) fa parte del Gruppo Inspired Education, uno dei principali gruppi scolastici premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, IST offre un ambiente di apprendimento internazionale stimolante nel Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe exklusiver Schulen mit einem Portfolio von 126 exklusiven Privatschulen auf 6 Kontinenten, die bewährte Bildungspraktiken aus aller Welt nutzen und so über 95.000 Schüler von Kindergarten bis zur 13. Klasse eine erstklassige Lernerfahrung bieten. Die International School of Ticino (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der weltweit führenden Premium-Schulgruppen. In Lugano gelegen bietet IST eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung im Tessin.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Inspired Education est le premier groupe mondial d’écoles premium, avec un portefeuille de 126 écoles privées premium réparties sur 6 continents qui utilisent des pratiques éducatives éprouvées provenant de chaque coin du monde, garantissant à plus de 95 000 élèves une expérience d’apprentissage de niveau international de la maternelle à la 13e année. L’International School of Ticino (IST) fait partie du Groupe Inspired Education, l’un des principaux groupes scolaires premium mondiaux. Située à Lugano, IST propose un environnement d’apprentissage international stimulant dans le Tessin.
